name: Universe Gym Laem Chabang
addressFull: 87/27, Thung Sukhla, Si Racha, Chon Buri 20230
hours: Open daily from 14:00; full closing schedule should be confirmed

equipment.airConditioningNotes: Reviews describe a spacious, airy gym but do not establish air conditioning.

praise: Thai reviews praise clean newer equipment, easy access, parking and friendly staff.

sources.label: Google Maps current branch listing and reviews

confidenceReason: Only one publisher family; membership, contract and air-conditioning evidence are absent.
identityNote: This is not the existing Universe Gym in Welcome Town/North Pattaya: the Laem Chabang branch has a different address and phone.
